headline: GE Vernova Expands Nuclear And Wind Footprint In Evolving Power Mix
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) has partnered with Hitachi to deploy BWRX-300 small modular nuclear reactors in Southeast Asia. The company has also been selected to supply wind turbines for the Fortore wind farm in Italy, one of the country's larger recent wind projects. Both developments expand GE Vernova's role across nuclear and wind power as demand for lower carbon energy options grows. For you as an investor, these updates touch two key parts of GE Vernova's business: nuclear and onshore wind...

headline: Battle Royale: GE Vernova vs. First Solar. Only One Can Make You Rich.
summary: The two clean energy companies fared very well in 2025.
